name: Seitan Soba
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the soba noodles according to package instructions, using just enough water to cover.
2. Cut the scallions into 1/2 inch pieces and reserve the crispy tops.
3. Mince or press the garlic cloves.
4. Slice the mushrooms thinly.
5. Chop the seitan into small pieces.
6. In a medium frying pan, sauté all ingredients with water as needed until cooked to your liking.
7. Turn off the heat and serve over drained (and rinsed) soba noodles. Adjust the sauce consistency by adding more water if desired.
